message.body: Hello Barfy. Looks like I can participate in chat again. Yay!
have you considered investing in an unban request in wherever you're banned
I was booted last night because one of your co-streamers had banned me.
I have only been made aware of two fangame streamers who had banned me, and I only ever find out when I try to chat and I'm told I can't.
I have requested an unban on both, but I can only do it once per account.
